title: cyclosorus angustus
intro: Cyclosorus angustus, also known as the narrow-leaved cyclosorus or Chinese cyclosorus, is a type of fern plant belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. Traditionally, Cyclosorus angustus has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. Cyclosorus angustus can be prepared into herbal tea, infusions, or decoctions, which are commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine.
